sfx_context.pattern_summary: Sound effects are used frequently, with vocal stingers on most words and impulse_noisy hits on key moments like reveals and punchlines. The hook uses a high density of vocal effects, while impulse_noisy effects emphasize important claims and actions.

caption_style.font_descriptor: bold rounded sans-serif with black stroke
